national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Chicago Gold Gallery
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site; offers free verbal in-person appraisals
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: buying gold, silver and diamonds 'for over 46 years' (est. ~1980); buys gold/silver coins, bullion, scrap gold, dental gold, watches, sterling silverware; 'we give free verbal in-person appraisals'; walk-in ('Bring your valuables in today'). No rates, fees, or testing method published.

buyers.name: Windy City Diamonds
buyers.payout_claims: Claims to 'pay the absolute highest prices' (no numbers posted)
buyers.testing_transparency: Evaluates your jewelry while you watch
buyers.evidence_notes: Gold & diamond buying page: buys 'old gold, silver, and platinum jewelry and gold and silver coins, flatware, and tea sets'; 'evaluate your jewelry while you watch'; immediate payment via check; walk-ins accepted, appointment scheduling offered. Jewelers Row address (1 S Wabash). Jewelry insurance offered as a separate service, not for selling transactions. No years-in-business claim found.

buyers.name: Diamonds On Wabash
buyers.payout_claims: Competitive market rates claimed; no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Certified appraisers create an itemized price sheet with evaluation while you wait
buyers.evidence_notes: We-buy-gold page: 'There is no appointment needed. Bring in your jewelry, we'll create a price sheet with evaluation for your pieces, and you will receive an offer from us right then and there.' Free, no-obligation evaluations; same-day cash payment. Jewelers Row address (15 S Wabash). No years-in-business claim found.

buyers.name: Razny Jewelers
buyers.payout_claims: Offer is 'based on the market price minus the cost of refinement'
buyers.testing_transparency: Professional in-store assessment of weight, karat purity, and condition; final evaluation done in-house at their Addison or Highland Park locations
buyers.evidence_notes: Buy-sell-gold page: 'third-generation, family-owned and operated'; buys gold jewelry, broken gold, single earrings, gold/silver coins, sterling; 'Walk-ins are welcome, and no appointment is necessary, though we encourage you to schedule one'; payment by check within 1-2 days (not on the spot). Chicago address confirmed on contact page (109 E. Oak St). Three suburban locations also listed. Hours behind collapsed widget, not extracted.

buyers.name: Chicago Precious Metals Exchange (CPME)
buyers.address: 111 W Jackson Blvd Suite 1700, Chicago, IL 60604
buyers.payout_claims: Buyback Guarantee at 'the current bid rate' for bullion and investment-grade coins
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site
buyers.evidence_notes: Homepage: 'constantly in the market offering fair prices to clients and non-clients alike for precious metals and investment grade gold coins they wish to sell'; 'CPME Buyback Guarantee... at the current bid rate' — but 'buyback price will not be locked in until after metals are received.' Bullion-oriented, Loop office suite; hours stated only as 'a 10-hour trading day', call first. Insurance discussed for client storage, not transactions.

buyers.name: West Town Jewelry & Loan
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described; offers a 'low pressure, no risk free appraisal'
buyers.evidence_notes: Site (goldbuyersinchicago.com) is the buying storefront of West Town Jewelry & Loan: buys 'all types of gold... gold coins, scrap gold, dental gold, sterling silver jewelry, silver coins', diamonds, watches, bullion, instruments. Claims 'almost 20 years' in business (implies since ~1997, but that copy may be stale — flagging). No hours, rates, or fees published on site.

buyers.name: Elemetal (Chicago)
buyers.payout_claims: Price 'based on the amount of precious metal anticipated to be recovered and the current market price'
buyers.testing_transparency: Assay-based pricing on recovered metal content; specific method not described on the location page
buyers.evidence_notes: Chicago location page: 'part of America's Largest Precious Metal Refiner'; 'At Elemetal, there are no hidden fees'; 'Simply bring your material to one of our secure Elemetal locations during business hours'; free shipping insurance mentioned for mail-in. Client list names dealers, jewelers, estate buyers, coin dealers, pawnbrokers — whether individual consumers can sell walk-in is not explicit, so flagged for verification.
